summary: Iteration 93: Live Sessions Feature - All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested (15/15 passed). Frontend UI verified with Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 93 Live Sessions feature fully tested. Key data-testids: live-sessions-page, create-session-btn, create-session-modal, session-title-input, type-{id}, scene-{id}, create-session-submit, session-card-{id}, live-room, live-room-back, toggle-participants, toggle-chat, chat-input, chat-send, host-controls, start-session-btn, end-session-btn, host-cmd-{begin|breathe-in|breathe-out|hold|focus|release|om|end}, nav-item-live (in Explore menu).

session_types_api.details: GET /api/live/session-types returns 8 session types (meditation, yoga, breathwork, sound-bath, mantra, prayer, qigong, open) and 6 virtual scenes (cosmic-temple, zen-garden, ocean-shore, mountain-peak, sacred-fire, aurora). Public endpoint, no auth required.

create_session_api.details: POST /api/live/sessions creates a new session with title, description, session_type, scene, duration_minutes. Returns session object with id, host_id, host_name, status='scheduled'. Requires authentication.

list_sessions_api.details: GET /api/live/sessions returns list of scheduled and active sessions with participant_count. Requires authentication.

get_session_api.details: GET /api/live/sessions/{id} returns session details with participants list and participant_count. Returns 404 for nonexistent sessions.

start_session_api.details: POST /api/live/sessions/{id}/start marks session as active (host only). Non-host users get 403 Forbidden. Returns 404 for nonexistent sessions.

end_session_api.details: POST /api/live/sessions/{id}/end marks session as ended (host only). Non-host users get 403 Forbidden. Returns 404 for nonexistent sessions.

live_sessions_page_ui.details: Live Sessions page at /live renders with 'Live Now' section (active sessions), 'Upcoming Sessions' section (scheduled sessions), 'Session Types' grid (8 types with icons and descriptions), and 'Host Session' button for authenticated users.

create_session_modal_ui.details: Create Session modal opens with title input, type grid (8 types), scene selector (6 scenes), and duration picker (10m, 15m, 20m, 30m, 45m, 60m). Submit creates session and redirects to Live Room.

live_room_ui.details: Live Room at /live/{id} renders with avatar circle view, chat sidebar with reactions bar, participants panel, scene background, and host controls (for host only).

host_controls_ui.details: Host sees 'Start Session' button when session is scheduled. After starting, host sees command buttons: Begin Practice, Breathe In, Breathe Out, Hold, Focus, Release & Let Go, Om, End Practice. End Session button also visible.

navigation_link.details: Live Sessions link appears in navigation under Explore dropdown menu with Radio icon.

websocket_note.details: WebSocket endpoint /api/live/ws/{session_id} exists but may not work in preview environment (Kubernetes ingress doesn't support WSS). REST endpoints all work. Live Room has fallback that adds user as participant even without WS connection.
